zinelist.name: The, Weakly
zinelist.content: Whoever you are, no matter how lonely, the world offers itself to your imagination. (Wild Geese / Mary Oliver)

zinelist.name: Complaint Therapy
zinelist.content: Everybody tells you life's a pit. But nobody tells you about the handholds.

zinelist.name: Touch Me Not
zinelist.content:
"And a rock feels no pain
And an island never cries"

In an exclusive interview with the author, they reported listening to the closing strains of Julian Casablancas in Selfless "Why'd you let them judge your boooooodyyyyyyy?"(emphasis as sung by author) while writing the zine.

On pressing further for their inspirations vis-a-vis a context to place the zine in, they requested me to hyperlink the following song.

El Scorcho - Weezer

zinelist.name: পুপু পিপি
zinelist.content: এক আঁকি, আরেক লিখি। পুপু — পিপি —

zinelist.name: Letters to my friends
zinelist.content: Everything we learnt in school was useless. At least for me. I've learnt more from my mistakes than the formulas and formats. So I think making a zine based on letter writing was my way of finding a source to put this knowledge of class 10th English writing comprehension formats to use. But then again, I used none of that in the zine. So to answer the real question, why does this zine exist-  Why? Because I was bored and I could.

zinelist.name: Horzine Around
zinelist.content:
"Can you give me a quote to go with your zine?"

"CANNOT pick because there's these two that always go hand in hand like I think of one and the other one pops up immediately —

  1. 'Yet because I knew nothing, nothing was beneath me.'
    Pg 74 of Circe life-changing so simple like FUCK why did I not know this already — What an icon Madeline Miller.

  2. This one quote I read in a Joachim Trier interview where he is wuoting Kierkegaard and adding his own thing to it :
    'We can only understand our life backward, but we’re forced to live it forward. And I think that’s the confusion we all feel, is that we always learn too late. We go through things that are completely inexplicable and mysterious. And then years later, we realize.'

Use either or both. I think both is nicer."

zinelist.name: U WILL BE OK ZINE
zinelist.content:
"do u want like an exact quote
ok i dont have quotes so i’m gonna give u lyrics"

"yes giv"

"these are the two songs that my subconscious decided to start playing when i sat in the car to give my drivers license test

  1. do you hear me? do you feel me? we gon' be alright- alright, kendrick lamar
  2. done stop believin', hold on to that feelin'- don’t stop believing, journey

and i think this is the most me thing i can give because whenever anything goes wrong in my life

it’s these two songs"

zinelist.name: The Case For Record Keeping
zinelist.content: The world is full of paper. Write to me. (Agha Shahid Ali)

zinelist.name: Pujo Zine
zinelist.content: The day my people come together.

zinelist.name: I am not an earth
zinelist.content:
I am not an earth nor an adjunct of an earth,
I am the mate and companion of people, all just as immortal and fathomless as myself,
(They do not know how immortal, but I know.)
I see through the broadcloth and gingham whether or no,
And am around, tenacious, acquisitive, tireless, and cannot be shaken away.
(7, Song of Myself / Walt Whitman)


Though I than He - may longer live
He longer must - than I -
For I have but the power to kill,
Without - the power to die -
(My Life had stood - a Loaded Gun / Emily Dickinson)

zinelist.name: Please Donot Take Pictures of the Artwork
zinelist.content: 'PLEASE DONOT TAKE PICTURES OF THE ARTWORK' is an art zine, that covers exhibits, pop-ups, artwork open to the public in Delhi. This zine preserves all of the above on paper and printer ink without a gilded frame, air-conditioning, squeaky floors, etc.

zinelist.name: Thought Daughter
zinelist.content: I have always been a thought daughter, born with a question mark on my head. A hungry kink for analyzing and dissecting everything from the bottle in the side pocket of a stranger’s backpack on the train to every real and hypothetical past, present, and future situation. This is primarily a love letter to fellow thought daughters out there.
